content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Accept. The direct CLI terminal-sync path in `run.rs` is only reconciling milestone/task state and never runs the br reconciliation flow that closes/syncs beads and applies terminal-review classification reconciliation, so operator-run completed/failed runs can miss those side effects.

## Votes

- `fr-6-97d91beb`: Accept
  In `sync_terminal_milestone_task_with_options`, terminal failures return after `reconcile_failure_sync` and completed runs only call `sync_controller_task_reconciling` + `record/repair_task_run_with_disposition` paths (around 1421, 1467, 1503), with no `reconcile_terminal_review_classifications` or bead close/sync. Since `execute_start`/`execute_resume` call this path before exit, this path is a real bypass of the new terminal classification reconciliation and bead-close behavior.
